meta_title: Orkesto - Modern web design and AI without the hassle
meta_description: Need modern web design, AI integration and transparent pricing? ORKESTO is the web agency for Swedish companies – monthly subscriptions from SEK 4,900. No hourly rates, fast delivery. Book a call today!
hero_description: Transparent monthly subscription from SEK 7,900/mo – design, development, AI integration and support. No hourly rates, no surprises. We help Swedish small and medium-sized companies modernize digitally and get results quickly.
hero_subtitle: Fast delivery · Sweden-based · AI that actually saves time
pricing_subheading: Choose the right level for your web design, AI integration or ongoing optimization. Everything is included in a fixed monthly price – no time tracking. Perfect for companies that want modern web development without hidden costs.
pricing_footer: No time reports. No extra costs. Switch or cancel anytime after the first month.
service_web_design_description: We create clean, fast and conversion-driven websites that feel premium and build trust from the first second.
service_web_design_detail: E.g. mobile-responsive design with focus on clear CTAs, minimal load times and high-quality typography that sells your services/products.
service_ai_integration_description: We build in AI tools that actually save time and money – like chatbots, automated customer support, smart content generation or predictive analytics.
service_ai_integration_detail: E.g. integration of Grok, ChatGPT-like models or simple automations via Zapier/Make that handle leads or scheduling without code complexity.
service_web_dev_description: We build robust, future-proof websites with modern technology (Next.js/React, headless CMS) that handle high traffic and stay updated automatically.
service_web_dev_detail: E.g. performance >95/100 on PageSpeed, built-in security against common threats, automatic updates and scalable hosting that grows with your company.
service_conversion_description: We analyze and improve your web for more leads, bookings or sales – with A/B testing, heatmaps and UX adjustments based on real data.
service_conversion_detail: E.g. increase conversion rate by 20–50% through better forms, clearer offers, faster checkout or personalized landing pages.
service_support_description: We take care of all the tedious stuff so you don't have to: security updates, backup, hosting, bug fixes and quick answers to your questions.
service_support_detail: E.g. priority support within 4 hours on weekdays, monthly report with improvement suggestions, and proactive monitoring so your site never goes down.
service_ai_education_title: AI understanding & training for your team
service_ai_education_description: We teach you and your team how AI works in practice – without buzzwords – so you can use it daily without depending on us for every little thing.
service_ai_education_detail: E.g. 1–2 hour workshop per quarter, simple guides for tools like Copilot, Midjourney or AI for customer service, and advice on how to avoid common AI pitfalls.
testimonial_1: Orkesto Studio helped us modernize our digital presence and streamline internal processes. The results were noticeable immediately.
testimonial_2: Fast, clear and no endless meetings.
testimonial_3: Finally straightforward pricing and AI that actually works.
cta_description: A no-strings-attached call takes 30 minutes. We listen first – then we tell you what we can do for you.
cta_footer: We'll get back to you within 24 hours
footer_tagline: Modern web and real AI – transparent, without the hassle.
contact_meta_description: Get in touch with Orkesto. Send us a message and we will get back to you shortly.
contact_subheading: Tell us a bit about what you need — we usually reply within one business day.
contact_success: Thanks! Your message has been sent. We will get back to you soon.
contact_error_email: Please enter a valid email address.
contact_error_not_configured: The contact form is temporarily unavailable. Please email us directly.
contact_error_send_failed: Something went wrong while sending. Please try again or email us directly.
